tasks.description: Filter events with content.file (string) and ≤2 keys
steps: Add detection for content.file being a string with ≤2 total keys in shouldSkipEvent()
Verify events like {"file":"/path/file.go"} are skipped
Verify events like {"event":"change","file":"..."} are skipped
Verify legitimate events with file property and more keys still render
Add detection for content.info being an object in shouldSkipEvent()
Verify events like {"info":{...tokens, cost...}} are skipped
Verify no regression in existing event rendering
Add detection for content.diff being an array in shouldSkipEvent()
Verify events like {"diff":[...],"sessionID":"..."} are skipped

tasks.description: Filter bare status events (sessionID + status without messageID)
steps: Add detection for content.sessionID + content.status without messageID in shouldSkipEvent()
Verify events like {"sessionID":"...","status":{...}} are skipped
Verify events with messageID are NOT skipped
Add detection for content.sessionID + content.summary in shouldSkipEvent()
Verify events like {"sessionID":"...","summary":{...}} are skipped

tasks.description: Verify existing skip logic and legitimate events still work
steps: Verify heartbeat, step-start, step-finish, snapshot, patch, compaction events are still skipped
Verify text events render correctly
Verify tool call events render correctly
Verify reasoning/thinking events render correctly
Verify agent events render correctly
Verify retry events render correctly
Verify error events render correctly

tasks.description: Add session status bar component at top of chat view
steps: Create status bar component inside chat-view.tsx border, above messages
Status bar shows busy state with blue pulsing dot and 'Agent is thinking...' text
Status bar shows idle state with gray dot and 'Idle' text
Status bar shows retry state with yellow dot and 'Retrying...' text
Apply appropriate background colors (bg-blue-900/30, bg-gray-800/50, bg-yellow-900/30)

tasks.description: Add terminal state display to status bar
steps: Status bar shows 'Completed' with green dot for completed minions (bg-green-900/30)
Status bar shows 'Failed' with red dot for failed minions (bg-red-900/30)
Status bar shows 'Terminated' with orange dot for terminated minions (bg-orange-900/30)

tasks.description: Handle status bar visibility for pending minions
steps: Status bar hidden when no status information available
Status bar hidden for pending minions before first event
Status bar appears once first status event is received

tasks.description: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_SSE environment variable for raw event logging
steps: Check for NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_SSE environment variable in use-minion-events.ts
When 'true', log '[SSE] Raw event: <JSON>' for each SSE message received
Logging occurs in onmessage handler before parsing

tasks.description: Add parsed event logging when debug enabled
steps: When NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_SSE is 'true', log '[SSE] Parsed event: <JSON>' showing normalized structure
Log occurs after event is parsed but before processing
When unset or 'false', no debug logging occurs

tasks.description: Verify debug logging does not break event processing
steps: Enable debug logging and verify all events still process correctly
Verify chat view still renders all legitimate events
Verify SSE connection remains stable with logging enabled
